summary: Explains how fee receipts are generated, their customizable format, and the information displayed on them, including remarks and concession details.
navigation: Fee Collection Section (after successful fee collection) > Receipt Display
steps: After collecting the fee, a confirmation message appears.
Confirm the transaction to generate the receipt.
The receipt will display details such as collected amount, date, fee heads, and any remarks entered.
The receipt format can be customized to match office requirements.
business_rules: Receipts are generated automatically upon successful collection.
Receipts can be customized with a logo and specific design.
important_notes: Share the institute logo for integration into the receipt template.
Remarks entered during collection will appear on the receipt.
Concession details will also be displayed on the receipt if applicable.
questions: How can I customize the fee receipt format?
What information is included on the fee receipt?
Can the institute's logo be added to the receipt?
Will concession details appear on the receipt?
